leadText: An Occa Berry (Japanese: オッカのみ Occa Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.2 Ingredient 1.3 Exchange 1.3.1 Pokémon Dream World Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder is hit by a supereffective Fire-type attack, it will consume its held Occa Berry and halve the attack's damage. If the holder has Ripen , the damage is multiplied by 1/4. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending OR AS Occa Berries are red Berries that have a medium chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Occa Berries will produce Poffins with Spiciness 13, Sweetness 8 and smoothness 29 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Occa Berries are red Berries in Group 2. Composting X Y Occa Berries are red Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 30 Occa Berries, Figy Berries , and Liechi Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into dark red. Curry Sw Sh Occa Berries have a rarity of 5. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Occa Berries are Fire-type items and give 4 points towards the output value. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Occa Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Pokémon Doll Catalogue Metagross Doll 15 Occa Berries

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Fire-type attack. HG SS If held by a Pokémon, it weakens a foe's supereffective Fire-type attack. B W B2 W2 Weakens a supereffective Fire-type attack against the holding Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Fire-type attack. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fire-type move, the power of that move will be weakened. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 36 Size: 3.5" (8.9 cm) Firmness: Super hard Games Description D P Pt BD SP This Berry is said to have grown plentiful in the tropics of the past. It boasts an intensely hot spiciness. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A Berry that is hard and spicy, but heating it up will increase its sweetness. It's perfect for a meal with a strong flavor.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Transfer from My Pokémon Ranch (held by Hayley's Combee and Metagross ) Pastoria City Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Mawile (5% chance) Ranch Hayley's trades (held by Combee and event Metagross ) HG SS Bought by player's Mom Battle Frontier (Scratch-Off Cards) Held by wild Mawile (5% chance) SS PW Hoenn Field , Winner's Path B W Held by wild Mawile and Pansage (5% chance) B2 W2 Join Avenue ( Flower Shop ) Held by wild Mawile and wild Pansage (5% chance each) DW * First completion of the tutorial (player will be given five of one of the damage-reducing Berries from Fennel ) Share Shelf X Y Inverse House Red Berry trees OR AS Route 123 Inverse Battle Stop Master Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 1) S M US UM Held by Totem Vikavolt S M Berry piles ( Poni Wilds , Poni Plains ) Ambush encounters ( Abomasnow in Ultra Space Wilds US UM ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Bridge Field ) Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Fields of Honor ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Ballimere Lake ) BD SP Pastoria City Picked up by walking Pokémon (Relaxed, Lax, Serious, Jolly, Naive, Modest, Mild, Rash Natures ) S V Sparkling overworld item ( Socarrat Trail ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Pokémon Center Curry Ingredients and Berries Japan November 15, 2019 to October 31, 2021 Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours An Occa plant will yield 1-5 Berries. A growing Occa plant's soil dries by 6% every hour, fully drying out in 17 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 27 hours Taller 54 hours Flowering 81 hours Berries 108 hours An Occa plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Growing 16 hours Bigger 24 hours Budding 32 hours Bloom 40 hours Berries 48 hours An Occa plant will yield 3-20 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.5, and removing a pest adds 2. Occa plants attract Ledyba as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 8 hours Taller 16 hours Flowering 24 hours Berries 32 hours An Occa plant will yield 2-10 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 30 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 44 hours Berries 48 hours An Occa plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 4 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 6 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours An Occa plant will yield 2-5 Berries.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Origin [ edit | edit source ] The Occa Berry's design and name may be based on cacao , specifically, the cacao fruit pod.
